message:
chore(artifacts): update ambient authority findings and beads metadata

Concurrent agent updates:

- artifacts/10.15/ambient_authority_findings.json: removed 2 SystemTime API
  findings for rollout_state.rs (already addressed); findings count 11 → 9
- artifacts/section_10_15/bd-721z/verification_evidence.json: updated totals
  to match reduced findings (findings_total 11 → 9, allowlisted 11 → 9)
- artifacts/section_10_15/bd-721z/verification_summary.md: updated markdown
  summary to reflect reduced findings
- .beads/issues.jsonl: concurrent metadata updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
